texto: In her dream each of the people assembled around her looked like several others, whom she recognized, only they weren't gradually transformed from one into the other but each of them seemed to be inside the others simultaneously and one of them shone through another. And something else was inside them as well, something unexplainable which wasn't within any of them, whose sum total they appeared to be, and this was what fascinated her above all.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Věra Linhartová: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “In her dream each of the people assembled around her looked like several others, whom she recogni…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, identity, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e reflexao.
